action.reasoning: Observation: New best bal_acc=0.5873 (val_tau_opt=0.594) via cRT 2-stage ResNet50 (Focal+sqrt-s1 60ep, CE+count-s2 30ep on head) + post-train tau=0.9 grid on balanced val; few-shot 0.381, many/medium stable ~0.77/0.59. Iter time ~5min, 2h/14 iters left. Analysis: Base features solid but can improve with Mixup(alpha=0.2) in s1 for robustness on LT data; nesterov+momentum in s2, 50/40ep split, finer tau grid (0-2.0 @0.05 steps) for better tradeoff. Current predict/train/model stable (weights_only=False fix worked). Decision: Rewrite clean complete train.py adding Mixup to s1, nesterov SGD s2 (lr=0.05), updated epochs, finer tau search + best_tau save to ckpt; keep model/predict unchanged; train then submit_eval immediately (follows >20ep rule, fits budget, targets ~0.59 bal_acc).
